freeze.reason: Centurion Cloud Migration — Stage 1 governance window (D1 DECIDED 2026-04-10)
freeze.lift_gate: Stage 8 go/no-go after full rehearsal cutover

changelog.2.1.145: SAV.FUND + SPV MATRIX — Downloadable PDF Invoices for Bills (Local-only): Clients, company admins, partner/ISO agents, and backend employees can now download a production-grade PDF invoice for any bill/payment record with one click. (1) Dependencies — Added jspdf@4.2.1 + jspdf-autotable@5.0.7 to both sites (bun add on savfund, npm on spvmatrix). (2) Per-site billing entity config — New src/config/billingEntity.ts on each site holding legalName, displayName, tagline, address, tax ID, and brand primaryColor. SAV branded as 'Sav.Fund' (Centurion Financial LLC), SPV branded as 'SPV Matrix LLC'. Single source of truth so swapping logo/entity/tax ID only touches one file. (3) Invoice PDF module — New src/lib/invoice-pdf.ts on each site using jsPDF + jspdf-autotable. Generator renders a colored header band, issuer block (legal name, address, tax ID, contact), INVOICE title + metadata (invoice #, issue date, status, paid-on date), Bill To + Reference two-column block, striped line-items autoTable, totals block (subtotal/tax/TOTAL DUE) with divider, translucent 'PAID' diagonal stamp for received bills, payment-instructions + optional notes footer, and per-page legal footer with page counts. Deterministic invoice numbering: INV-YYYY-XXXXXX for funding bills and ENG-YYYY-XXXXXX for engagement bills, derived from UUID so the same record always produces the same invoice number — critical for wire reconciliation. Falls back to stored invoice_number if one already exists on the record. (4) Shape mappers — SAV exports fromFundingBill and fromEngagementBill (dual schemas) and SPV exports fromPayment which normalizes a payments row joined with spvs and client_profile into the BillLike shape. All bill surfaces funnel through these mappers so the PDF stays consistent. (5) UI wiring — SAV: client/Bills.tsx, iso/Bills.tsx, company/Bills.tsx, employee/Bills.tsx all got Download/PDF buttons. SPV: ClientBills.tsx + PaymentManagement.tsx (the shared component used by EmployeePayments and SuperAdminPayments) got Download icon + handleDownloadInvoice handler + PDF button in the actions cell. (6) Typecheck — Both sites typecheck clean (tsc --noEmit, exit 0, no errors). (7) Scope — Local only, not deployed to production. CompanyFinances.tsx on SPV intentionally untouched because it synthesizes mock payment rows from SPV records rather than reading real payment data.
changelog.2.1.144-testing-sync: Testing + Docs Sync for V2.1.137 → V2.1.143 (2026-04-09): Propagated accumulated changes from 7 versions into testing and documentation layers. Layer 1 (AI Testing Team test-suites.md): Added Section 11 with 9 subsections (56 new test cases) covering SAV contract variable standardization (11.1, 10 cases), SPV ContractVariableManager 5-user-type refactor (11.2, 6 cases), CC Human Testing tester pool security V2.1.138 (11.3, 6 cases), Testing Members tab UX V2.1.139 (11.4, 5 cases), Per-Run Role Assignments wizard V2.1.140 (11.5, 10 cases), Test Admin Elevation V2.1.141 (11.6, 10 cases), SAV lazy PDF download V2.1.142 (11.7, 9 cases), and SPV pre-signed contract upload + Juan Uribe stuck-client fix V2.1.143 (11.8, 15 cases). Table of Contents updated with new entry. Layer 2 (AI Testing Team LIVE production-workflow-tests.md): Added Sections 12–15 with 22 new production workflows covering contract variable managers, onboarding agent flows, Human Testing refinements, Sav.Fund Contracts download page testing, and SPV pre-signed contract upload admin workflows. Revision History updated with all 7 new versions. Layer 3 (Testing DOCX guides): Not updated this sync — CC Human Testing changes (v2.1.138–141) are CC-only features tracked in Layer 1 only; SAV/SPV contract changes can be added to DOCX guides in a follow-up sync if needed. Layer 4 (Human Testing UI on CC): No changes needed — JSON loader auto-picks up test cases from Layer 1/2 references. Ecosystem Docs: Updated 01-ECOSYSTEM-OVERVIEW.md, 02-SITE-FEATURE-SETS.md, and 06-ECOSYSTEM-SUMMARY.md version headers and last-updated dates to V2.1.143 / 2026-04-09. All testing artifacts now in sync with v2.1.143 feature set. Local only — not deployed.
changelog.2.1.142: SAV.FUND Contracts — Always-visible Download button with lazy PDF generation: Signed contracts created via onboarding edge functions (ClientOnboardFormWithContract / AgentOnboardFormWithContract) never called generateAndStoreContractPdf, so signed_contracts rows landed with pdf_path = NULL and every Contracts page hid the download button behind a {item.pdf_path && (...)} gate. Fix: new ensureContractPdfPath + ensureContractPdfAndDownload helpers in contract-pdf-storage.ts that lazy-generate the PDF, backfill the signed_contracts row, then download/return the path. All 5 Contracts pages (iso, funder, company, client, employee) updated — download buttons are now always rendered, show a Loader2 spinner while generating, and call the new helper. employee/Contracts.tsx also got a handleViewSigned helper that uses ensureContractPdfPath + getContractPdfUrl so the dialog View button works on rows that never had a PDF. client/Contracts.tsx PDF column badge now always reads Available since the download path always works. No database schema changes; no edge function changes. Local-only change, not deployed.
changelog.2.1.141: CC V2.1.141 â€” Test Admin Elevation for Human Testing: V2.1.140 inadvertently let any active testing member hit the New Test Run button on /testing â€” regular agents could start ecosystem-wide test suites. Fix: new is_admin BOOLEAN column on human_test_permissions (migration 20260409_002), TestPermission.is_admin field, useMyTestPermission now returns isTestAdmin, TesterDashboard hides the New Test Run button + wizard unless isTestAdmin is true (shows an informational hint instead). HumanTestingDashboard Testing Members table gains a Test Admin Switch column + ADMIN badge; backend admins flip the switch to elevate/demote individual members. setPermissionAdmin method added to useHumanTesting hook. Secure-by-default: before the migration runs, every member reads as is_admin=false via normalizePermission, so no tester can start runs until the column is live AND an admin explicitly toggles them on. Backend employees on /admin/h-testing are unaffected â€” they can always start runs.
changelog.2.1.140: CC V2.1.140 — Per-Run Role Assignments (replaces V2.1.134 global role-assignment model). New DB migration adds role_assignments JSONB column to human_test_runs. New Test Run dialog is now a 2-step wizard: (1) pick guide, (2) grid UI where rows are active Testing Members and columns are the test roles relevant to the selected guide (filtered from test-role-config.json by site). Admin checks cells to assign members to one or more roles for that specific run; assignments are stored as {user_id,user_email,user_name,test_role_ids[]} on the run record. Skip & Create Unassigned preserves legacy behavior. TesterDashboard at /testing now surfaces each run the tester is assigned to along with the login email(s)/role label(s) they should test as (My Role column + Login as banner on in-progress runs). Run history table on admin dashboard now shows an Assignments badge per run. Dead V2.1.134 code (useTestAdmin.ts, AgentTestingDashboard.tsx) neutralized into empty export stubs — neither was imported anywhere.
changelog.2.1.139: CC V2.1.139 — Testing Members tab (UX polish on top of V2.1.138). Human Testing dashboard tab renamed from Manage Testers to Testing Members. All copy refreshed: Add Testing Member card, Add Member button, Active Testing Members table, Remove (was Revoke). Select placeholder clarifies "Select an agent or backend employee". Dashboard subtitle updated. No logic changes — strict agent+backend-only filter from V2.1.138 and the conditional Human Testing nav item in AppSidebar (only rendered for non-backend users with active human_test_permissions) remain in effect. Non-member agents do not see the nav item.
changelog.2.1.138: CC V2.1.138 — Human Testing Tester Pool Security + Agent Tester Nav: HumanTestingDashboard Add Tester dropdown strictly restricted to agents (company/partner org members or agent-type roles) and backend employees. Clients/leads/guests/funder_*/site-only users are hidden — they cannot be granted testing permission. AppSidebar now conditionally adds a Human Testing nav item pointing to /testing (tester portal) for any agent with an active human_test_permissions record, using the existing useMyTestPermission hook. This makes granting tester permission the single action required to enable an agent to test — the nav item appears automatically on their CC dashboard. TesterLayout permission check was already permission-based (not role-based), so agents routed to /testing pass TesterLayout and reach TesterDashboard normally. Also stripped 32 trailing NUL bytes from src/lib/siteConfig.ts caused by a prior parallel-session race condition.
changelog.2.1.137: Contract Variable Standardization (SPV + SAV): (1) SPV MATRIX — ContractVariableManager fully standardized with 5 user types (client, company, company_agent, partner_agency, partner_agent) and proper sources (parent_company, parent_agency, company_settings, platform_settings). ContractVariableSidebar updated with color-coded groups for all sources. Settings page now has SPV Company Info, Officer Signature, Company Main User Signature, and Partner Agency Main User Signature managers. AddOrganizationAgentModal pre-fills parent org + platform settings into agent contracts. New usePlatformSetting generic hook. (2) SAV.FUND — ContractEditor DEFAULT_VARIABLES extended with company_agent and partner_agent types using same schema. OfficerSignatureManager rewritten with Sav.Fund Company Info, Officer, Company, and Agency signature managers. Contracts Settings tab updated with all 4 managers. AgentOnboardFormWithContract now fetches and pre-fills officer, company info, and parent org signatures from platform_settings. New usePlatformSetting hook. Both sites build verified.
changelog.2.1.136-testing-sync: Testing Sync for V2.1.135 (2026-04-07): Updated all 4 testing layers after V2.1.135 production deployment. Layer 1 (AI Testing Team test-suites.md): Added 29 test cases for role normalization (dual legacy+canonical names across 4 sites), delete user/company/entity functions with .single()→.some() fix, CC site management (manage-site edge function, activate/deactivate/delete sites), and ecosystem sync rules (asymmetric adding, CC-authoritative deletion). Layer 2 (AI Testing Team LIVE production-workflow-tests.md): Added 8 comprehensive workflow sections (Sections 8-11) covering site management, role normalization verification, delete workflows with security fixes (LeadCRM auth, SPV entity filter), and ecosystem sync rule validation. Layer 3 (Testing DOCX guides): Added 25 new test case rows across SavFund (4), LeadCRM (4), SPVMatrix (13), and CrossSite (4) testing guides; ran sync-docx-to-json.py to regenerate all JSON test suites. Layer 4 (Human Testing UI): No changes needed — JSON sync auto-updates test case display. All testing artifacts now in sync with V2.1.135 feature set.
changelog.2.1.134-testing-sync: Human Testing V2 Testing Sync (2026-04-07): Updated test-suites.md with 46 new test cases (cc-htv2-01 through cc-htv2-46) covering TEST ADMIN role management, role assignment system, test run lifecycle with pause/resume, agent portal testing at /portal/h-testing, role-scoped test runner with login banner and credentials, cross-agent result visibility, and database integrity validation. Updated production-workflow-tests.md with 6 comprehensive production workflows: role assignment creation and agent access, pause/resume test run controls, TEST ADMIN grant/revoke, test run deletion and cascading, agent portal credentials handling, and credentials security verification. Layer 1 (AI Testing) and Layer 2 (Production LIVE) documentation synced; Layers 3 (DOCX) and 4 (Human Testing Feature) skipped as CC-only feature already deployed.
changelog.2.1.135: Superadmin Management & Delete Fix (All Sites): (1) SAV.FUND — Employees page now queries both legacy+canonical role names (backend_user/backend_admin/backend_superadmin), fixing empty employee list. admin-delete-company .single() crash fixed (now uses .some() for multi-role users). admin-delete-user role checks updated for canonical names. AppRole type extended. 16+ files updated across frontend+edge functions. (2) LEADCRM — CRITICAL: admin-delete-user corsHeaders undefined variable fixed (was crashing ALL error paths). internal-delete-user got bridge key auth (was unauthenticated). .single() role check replaced. 9 edge functions + hooks updated for canonical roles. (3) SPV MATRIX — admin-delete-entity role filter updated from legacy-only to dual legacy+canonical names (fixes 403 for backend_superadmin users). cc-sync-data security fix: removed service_role_key from API response, bridge key moved to env var. 7 files updated. (4) COMMANDCENTER — New manage-site edge function bypasses RLS for site CRUD (fixes cannot edit/delete sites). SiteManager.tsx rewired to use edge function. BulkDeleteDialog supports per-site deletion via siteId parameter. Ecosystem sync rules verified. ~40 files across 4 sites.
changelog.2.1.134: Human Testing V2 — Role-Based Test Assignments: (1) TEST ADMIN role — is_test_admin flag on profiles, only TEST ADMINs + backend users can start/pause/end runs, assign roles, manage tests. (2) Role Assignment System — human_test_role_assignments table maps users to test user roles (22 roles across 4 sites + cross-site). Each assignment includes test account credentials and portal URL. Agents can be assigned multiple roles. (3) Agent Portal Testing — agents with TEST ADMIN or role assignments see Human Testing in /portal/h-testing sidebar nav. AgentTestingDashboard shows assigned roles with credentials, test progress, and run participation. (4) Role-Scoped Test Runner — HumanTestRunner shows only test cases matching assigned roles. Login info banner with copyable credentials and portal links. Only assigned user can pass/fail/skip their items. (5) Pause/Resume — runs can be paused/resumed with status tracking. (6) Test Admins Management — backend superadmin/admin can grant/revoke TEST ADMIN status from dashboard Tab 3. (7) 3 new test users created (lead.client, sav.admin, spv.admin) for full role coverage (25 total). (8) Orchestrator + Monitor skills created for automated testing session management. DB migration: new table + 3 ALTER TABLEs + RLS policies + helper function. ~15 files modified/created on CC.
changelog.2.1.133: Contract Management Fix: (1) SPV + SAV — Consolidated separate Company Agent / Partner Agent tabs into single 'Agents' tab on Contract Management pages. (2) Added Company Onboarding Agreement template (copied from Partner Agency pattern) to both SPV and SAV. (3) SPV company template updated from 'general' to 'onboarding' category. Agent contract templates (Company Agent + Partner Agent) remain as editable onboarding contracts for superadmins.
changelog.2.1.132: User Management & Agent Contracts Overhaul: (1) Fix 1 — Removed CenturionFinancial.com as site option from SiteManager, cleaned dead centurion sync code from full-ecosystem-sync, removed service_provider from ROLE_PRIORITY/CC_ROLES. (2) Fix 2 — Simplified role/portal logic: portal 100% auto-derived from org type (company→company, partner→partner_agency, backend→backend). Created AddBackendUserWizard for backend employee creation (separate from agent wizard). Removed service_provider from siteConfig. UserDirectory backend tab wired to new wizard. (3) Fix 3 — Partner agencies now require parent company selection. parent_org_id populated on creation. Company dropdown in OrganizationManager + QuickAddOrgDialog. Parent Company column in org list. DB index + FK constraint added. (4) Fix 4 — Agent contracts for company_agent and partner_agent on SPVMatrix + Sav.Fund. Contract templates seeded on both sites. SPV AddOrganizationAgentModal now requires contract signing (removed skipContractSigning). SAV AgentOnboardFormWithContract created with 2-step flow. Commission rate field added to all agent creation paths. Contract Management admin pages updated with agent template tabs on both sites. cc-create-user edge functions accept commission_rate. CC AddAgentWizard gets commission_rate field + prefilled org mode. New AgentTeam portal page for company/partner admins to add agents from CC. relay-create-user restored and updated with commission_rate forwarding. ~40 files across 3 sites.
changelog.2.1.131: CRITICAL SECURITY FIX — Agent Access Control: All /admin/* routes were accessible to any authenticated user (agents, company/partner users) since V2.1.7 removed requireSuperAdmin. Sidebar nav hiding was cosmetic only. Fix: (1) BackendRoute guard blocks non-backend users from /admin/*, (2) AgentRoute guard creates /portal/* routes for agents, (3) RoleRedirect routes backend→/admin/dashboard, agents→/portal/dashboard, (4) New AgentLayout + AgentSidebar + AgentDashboard for scoped agent portal. 7 files added/modified.
changelog.2.1.130: SPV Matrix: Remove public self-signup. Deleted RoleSelection.tsx and RoleSignup.tsx. Routes /auth/signup and /auth/signup/:role now redirect to /auth/portal-selector. SPV Matrix is now invitation-only like all other sites — users must be created by admins.
changelog.2.1.129: Ecosystem-Wide Role Normalization: Unified role model across all 4 sites (CC, SAV, LEAD, SPV). Agents belong to ONE org type (Company or Partner Agency) with ONE tier (main/admin/agent). Portal access derived from org type, CC access independent. Added junction tables (company_users, partner_agency_users) with tier columns on all satellites. Canonical role names (backend_superadmin, backend_admin, backend_user, company_admin, company_agent, partner_admin, partner_agent, funder_agent, client) added to all DB enums. All auth pages dual-accept legacy + canonical role names. CC AddAgentWizard simplified to org+tier selection (role auto-derived). CC UserDetail shows editable tier with derived portal. CC AddToSiteDialog reduced to single tier dropdown. All satellite cc-create-user edge functions accept tier parameter and create junction records. SPV dual-enum (app_role + user_role) both extended. ~240 files updated across ecosystem.
changelog.2.1.128: CC Access Type Management: Role-branched sidebar navigation (backend employees see full 15-item admin view, agents see 3-item scoped view with Dashboard/My Org/Commissions). CC Role selector dropdown in UserDetail page to toggle users between backend employee and agent access. CC Type column in UserDirectory showing Shield/Briefcase badges. useProfile hook extended with getCCAccessType() classification using BACKEND_ROLES and AGENT_ROLES sets.
changelog.2.1.127: CEO Role Fix + Docs Update: Fixed ceo@centurionfinancial.com roles across all 4 production sites — Sav.Fund and LeadCRM upgraded from company_user to company_admin with is_admin=true, SPVMatrix stray super_admin role removed (kept company_admin), CC profile updated with master_role=company and user_roles set to company_agent. Updated framework-design skill, flow charts (Section 11), and cross-site interactions docs with correct Phase 3.5 onboarding flow (exports create onboarding links, not direct records). Test suite counts updated to 537 (crosssite 71).
changelog.2.1.126: Main User / Contract Signer Creation: CC org creation forms now create main user (contract signer) profile + org_member simultaneously with org. Signer email, first/last name fields added to OrganizationManager and QuickAddOrgDialog. Ensures satellite site onboarding contracts have proper signer info. AI Testing Team LIVE skill updated with contract verification steps. Deleted stale LiveTest Holdings LLC test data.
changelog.2.1.125: Onboarding Flow Validation: CC org/partner/agent creation forms now collect contact first/last name, commission rate, JV settings required for satellite site onboarding contracts. Validation warnings shown when required fields are missing. Onboarding metadata stored in org settings JSON. AddMemberDialog enforces first/last name for new users. AI Testing Team LIVE skill updated with correct per-site company creation and onboarding flows.
changelog.2.1.124: Run 18 Fixes: (1) SavFund Funder/Company/Partner auth — added missing SavFund-specific roles (funding_company_user, company_user, iso_user) to test DB accounts that only had V2 role names (funder_agent, company_agent, partner_agent). (2) SPV Matrix signup routes — created RoleSignup.tsx component and wired /auth/signup/:role route in App.tsx so RoleSelection card navigation works. (3) Integration API key verified valid — 401 was from RLS policies correctly blocking anon access, not a bad key. Granted SELECT on funding_company_users, user_roles, company_users to anon role to fix cascading RLS policy errors.
changelog.2.1.123: AI Testing Team Skill V3: Added mandatory browser instance isolation — each subagent gets its own Chromium process via BROWSE_STATE_FILE env var, eliminating deadlocks and 'Detached while handling command' errors from Run 16. Added per-agent setup/cleanup blocks, orphan process detection, Run 16 lessons learned documented.
changelog.2.1.122: AI Testing Team Skill V2: Added mandatory stop-on-skip rule (agents MUST stop on first blocker instead of cascading skips), watchdog agent for timeout enforcement and quality gates, hardcoded test environment URLs with LIVE verification, enhanced browser automation rules with full JS nativeSet code snippets, Run 15 anti-patterns documented. Learning log updated with Run 15 results.
changelog.2.1.121: SavFund Employee Detail Views: Added ClientDetail.tsx and CompanyDetail.tsx pages for employee portal with full data display (client info, businesses, fundings, company team members). Wired /backend/clients/:id and /backend/companies/:id routes. Company and client name clicks now navigate to detail views instead of opening drawers/dialogs.
changelog.2.1.120: Test Environment Fix: Deployed 5 edge function stubs to test Supabase (audit-log, send-notification, scan-document, send-onboarding-invite, send-security-report). Created 404.html SPA redirect for all 3 satellite sites. Fixed test user DB associations (partner_agency_id for SPV/SAV partner users, funding_company links). Preparing for AI Testing Run 15.
changelog.2.1.119: Run 13 Fixes: (1) Sav.Fund — added /partner/auth and /auth/partner route aliases so partner login no longer 404s. (2) SPV Matrix — SystemLogs role check now includes backend_superadmin so SuperAdmin can access System Logs page. (3) LeadCRM — added /backend/calendar route for employee Calendar page (component existed but had no route).
changelog.2.1.118: SPV Matrix R12 Fix follow-up: ClientDashboard todo description rendering now sanitizes 'SPV Job null' from pre-existing database records (replaces with 'your SPV Job'). Rebuilt with --mode test to use test Supabase env.
changelog.2.1.117: SPV Matrix Run 12 Fixes: (1) Client Dashboard — todo titles with null job numbers now display cleanly (strips ' - null' suffix, falls back to 'Action Required'). createPaymentAndTodo uses safeJobNumber fallback (SPV-{id}) when jobNumber is null/undefined. (2) Employee Login — added inline error banner for role mismatch (non-employee users see persistent red error message instead of only a transient toast). loginError state tracks and displays auth failures visibly.
changelog.2.1.116: User Management Overhaul: (1) siteConfig.ts rebuilt with canonical V2 role names (backend_superadmin/backend_admin/backend_user/company_agent/partner_agent) — removed all non-CC-managed portals (client, funder, guest, service_provider, iso). (2) OrganizationManager + QuickAddOrgDialog: removed funding_company and ISA org types — CC only manages companies and partner agencies. (3) AddAgentWizard: removed client/funder portal options, added partner_agent portals for all 3 sites, simplified org selection (company or partner_agency only), removed unused office/CENTURION_OFFICES. (4) AddToSiteDialog: user types limited to Company Agent / Partner Agent / Backend Employee, removed client and service_provider options. (5) AddMemberDialog: portal options updated to canonical roles (company_agent/partner_agent). (6) UserDirectory: org name display fixed — canonical lookup via org_members→organizations instead of denormalized text field, role display uses human-readable labels via getRoleLabel(). (7) New normalizeRole() and getRoleLabel() helpers in siteConfig.ts for backward-compatible role mapping.
changelog.2.1.115: CC User Directory Fix: Agents tab now sources from org_members + user_site_access (fixes missing Post Oak agents who had no user_site_access records). Backend Employees tab matches actual master_role values (super_admin, admin) and is_super_admin flag (fixes empty tab). Role filter dynamically populated from actual data. Organization column pulls from org_members when user_site_access has no org. Removed Portal Type column (unused).
changelog.2.1.114: CC User Directory Redesign: Two-tab layout (Agents | Backend Employees). Only managed roles shown — funders, clients, leads, guests, service providers excluded (satellite-managed). Sortable column headers (click to sort asc/desc) on UserDirectory, OrganizationManager, and SiteManager tables.
changelog.2.1.113: CC UX: Added category filter to User Directory (Admin/Company/Partner/Funder/Other), removed client/lead users from directory (managed on satellite sites). Added search + status filter to Site Manager. Fixed Tricia Littell CC sync (handle_new_user trigger + user_site_access + org_members).
changelog.2.1.112: relay-create-user 404 Fix: Removed apikey header from frontend relay fetch calls. Supabase gateway uses apikey header to trigger JWT verification path which rejects the anon key sent as Authorization Bearer token. Only Authorization header needed for gateway routing.
changelog.2.1.111: relay-create-user Gateway Auth Fix: Frontend changed from supabase.functions.invoke() to direct fetch() with x-user-token header. Edge function reads user JWT from x-user-token (preferred) or Authorization (legacy). Fixes 404 caused by Supabase gateway rejecting ES256 user JWT when verify_jwt=true (config.toml not deployed). Both AddAgentWizard and AddToSiteDialog updated.
changelog.2.1.110: SAV Fund Funder Co-Owner Credit Fix: CreditScoresDisplay now accepts optional clientId prop to bypass fundings table RLS lookup. FunderFundingDetails passes client_id directly so the additional owners query resolves without needing SELECT on the parent funding row (blocked by funder_can_access_funding RLS). Co-owner credit scores (owner_credit_pulls) now visible in funder view.
changelog.2.1.109: SAV Fund Funder Sub-Job Credit & Bank Fix: Credit pulls and bank analysis are stored on the parent funding but funders view sub-jobs. FunderFundingDetails now resolves source_funding_id and passes the parent funding ID to CreditScoresDisplay and BankStatementAnalysis. RLS policies for funding_credit_pulls and funding_bank_analysis updated to follow the source_funding_id link so funders assigned to sub-jobs can see parent funding credit/bank data.
changelog.2.1.108: Dynamic Version Display: Replaced hardcoded '1.0.0' version strings in CommandCenter SettingsPage, SPV Matrix HelpSupport and HelpPageContent with build-time injection from ecosystem-version.json via Vite define config. All 3 main sites now read their version from the shared ecosystem version file at build/dev-server start.
changelog.2.1.107: SAV Fund Funder View Data Access Fix: Added missing RLS SELECT policies for profiles, owner_experian_credentials, and owner_documents tables so funders can see client name/contact info, additional owner Experian credentials, and owner documents for their assigned fundings. Previously these queries silently returned empty due to missing funder policies.
changelog.2.1.106: SPV Matrix Employee Actions: Undo/reset completed steps back to pending (clears completion + out-of-date flags), delete files from step records and storage, reassign entire SPV job to a different client with notifications to both parties. Actions available in both Timeline view (hover buttons) and Steps Manager (reset + delete buttons). New ClientReassignDialog with client search and confirmation flow.
changelog.2.1.105: SAV Fund Funder Credit Visibility Fix: Added missing RLS policies so funders can view funding_credit_pulls (3-bureau scores + reports) and client_experian_credentials (Experian credit score) for their assigned fundings. Previously these silently returned empty — funder view components were present but data was blocked by RLS.
changelog.2.1.104: relay-create-user CORS Fix: Added verify_jwt=false to config.toml (Supabase gateway was blocking OPTIONS preflight). Added Access-Control-Allow-Methods header and explicit 204 status on OPTIONS response.
changelog.2.1.103: Human Testing Enhancements: TEST ALL option runs all 529 test cases across 4 guides in one sequential run. Tester portal at /testing for non-admin permitted users. Backend admins manage testers (grant/revoke) from Manage Testers tab. Backend admins can delete test runs. Testers see each other's completed runs (read-only). DB migration adds human_test_permissions table with RLS + delete policies on runs/results.
changelog.2.1.102: SAV Fund Commission On Hold: Backend employees can place any commission (company/ISO/agent) on hold with a typed reason (escrow, refundable, etc.). On Hold status shows amber badge with tooltip reason on company and partner agency Commissions pages. Commission Payouts tab uses CommissionStatusBadge for pending/paid/on_hold display. Hold can be released back to pending or marked paid directly. DB migration adds on_hold to CHECK constraints and hold_reason columns.
changelog.2.1.101: SAV Fund Billing Role Controls: Commission visibility is role-based — backend employees can edit, company/partner admins see read-only, agents see only their own potential commission. Pitch deck dialog now creates engagement bill with same commission + notification logic. ISO/Partner Agency Clients page gets Create Pitch Deck and Create Engagement Bill actions. BillUserContext type exported for reuse.
changelog.2.1.100: SAV Fund Engagement Bill UX: Commission rate fields (Company %, ISO %, Agent %) now editable at bill creation with live breakdown preview. Notify Client toggle lets backend skip email + in-app notification. Button text adapts to notification state.
changelog.2.1.99: Human Testing System: Added /admin/h-testing to CommandCenter with dashboard, test runner, and results pages. 424 test cases across 4 guides (SavFund, LeadCRM, SPVMatrix, CrossSite) parsed from DOCX to JSON. Supabase tables for test runs/results. DOCX-to-JSON sync script. AI Testing Team skill updated for new Testing/ folder structure. Shared testing docs between AI and Human testing teams.
changelog.2.1.98: SAV Fund Owner Consent Fix: Changed owner_credit_pulls consent creation from upsert to insert — upsert referenced dropped unique constraint (funding_id,owner_id) causing 'no unique or exclusion constraint matching ON CONFLICT' error when recording consent for additional owners.
changelog.2.1.97: SAV Fund Bank Analysis + Document Viewer Fix: BankStatementManager now polls check-bank-analysis edge function every 30s while processing (was never calling it, leaving status stuck). DocumentPreview switched from iframe+signedUrl to blob download to fix 'content is blocked' X-Frame-Options error on Supabase storage URLs.
changelog.2.1.96: SPV Matrix Agent Name Fix: SPVManagement table now shows actual assigned agent name (from assigned_company_agent_id / assigned_pa_agent_id / assigned_employee_id) instead of falling back to company/partner agency name or onboarded_by.
changelog.2.1.95: SAV Fund Client Fee Commission System: All commissions now calculated as % of Client Fee (not funded amount). Client Fee = main_commission_rate% of funded amount, set at contract signing. EmployeeFunderApprovalReviewDialog redesigned with editable client fee rate, commission preview showing fee→split math, total distribution validation. Added editMode for post-approval commission editing (Edit Commissions button on approved approvals in FunderActivitySection). EmployeeApprovalDialog relabeled to 'Client Fee Rate'. Recalculate in Employee Commissions page now uses client fee base. commissions.ts and potential-commissions.ts updated. FundingDetailsDrawer commission card relabeled 'Client Fee'.
changelog.2.1.94: SPV Matrix Fixes + Test DB Migration: Fixed valid_country constraint violation for Series LLC and all SPV types — replaced broken heuristic with config-driven getCountryForSPVType() in all 3 create dialogs (Employee, Company, PartnerAgency). Added series_llc to spvTypes config. Test DB: migrated contract_templates schema (title→name, added user_type/status columns), seeded 3 active templates (client, company, partner_agency). AI Testing Team docs updated with correct site-specific passwords.
changelog.2.1.93: SAV Fund Hang Fix + Auth Fix: All 22+ send-notification edge function calls converted to fire-and-forget (never block UI). Created fireAndForgetNotification utility in notifications.ts. Fixed double sign-in issue — auth pages now auto-redirect to dashboard when user already has required roles. SupportInbox/SupportEmails reply mutations reordered to store record first, then fire-and-forget email. Funding approval, onboarding, document request, cancel, and assignment flows no longer hang on slow email delivery.
changelog.2.1.92: SAV Fund Commission Tracking: Added commission payment status tracking for all bill types (funding + engagement). Employee Bills page now has 3 tabs: Funding Bills, Engagement Bills, Commission Payouts. Backend users can mark each commission (company, ISO, agent) as paid independently. Company and Partner Agency portals show engagement fee commissions in new tab. DB migration adds commission status columns to engagement_bills.
changelog.2.1.91: SAV Fund Billing v2: Added Revert to Unpaid and Mark as Returned actions on backend bills (employee + engagement). Returned status shows red badge on client + backend. Client notified (in-app + email) on all status changes. Added bill_payment_returned email template. Returned bills show under Outstanding with Wire Transfer button.
changelog.2.1.9: SAV Fund Billing Update: Wire-only payments (credit card removed). Wire instructions updated with real banking details (TDECU / Centurion Financial GP Inc). SWIFT code removed, Bank Address renamed to Account Address. Added client notifications on bill marked paid (in-app + email). Created engagement_bill_created and bill_payment_confirmed email templates.
changelog.2.1.8: SPV Partner Login Fix: Removed invalid partner_admin from PartnerAgencyLogin role query (not in DB enum). Query now uses only partner_agent. Fixes Postgres 22P02 error causing 'Could not verify user permissions' for partner logins.
changelog.2.1.7: CC Admin Redirect Fix: Removed requireSuperAdmin from admin route wrapper (all CC users access admin routes). ProtectedRoute no longer redirects to /workspace. Workspace routes and imports fully removed from App.tsx. Fixes redirect loop where non-superadmin users were sent to /workspace instead of /admin/dashboard.
changelog.2.1.6: Run 10 Fixes: SPV Matrix — EmployeeLogin, PartnerAgencyLogin, SuperAdminLayout, AutomationHub updated to unified V2.0 role enum (backend_user, backend_superadmin, partner_agent). CommandCenter — RoleRedirect now sends all users to /admin/dashboard (workspace tier removed in V2.0), CenturionFinancial.com removed from Dashboard sites query, ConnectionsDashboard, UserMigration, AddMemberDialog, siteConfig. SAV Fund — rebuild with existing redirect fix code.
changelog.2.1.5: Super Admin Login Fix: SPV Matrix — EmployeeLogin, SuperAdminLayout, AutomationHub, SystemLogs all updated to accept both backend_superadmin and super_admin roles. Bug report notifications also reach super_admin users. Production DB: handle_new_user() rewritten for SPV Matrix schema (first_name/last_name instead of full_name, user_id populated). create_notification_preferences() fixed for SPV Matrix schema (boolean columns, no notification_type).
changelog.2.1.4: Critical DB Fixes (4 issues from lifecycle test): (1) Organizations RLS — added super_admin/admin roles to superadmin test users so has_role() policies work; (2) Auth trigger — rewrote handle_new_user() with correct column mapping (id, full_name, text role) + fixed create_notification_preferences() trigger (NEW.id, composite conflict target); (3) SPV Matrix schema — added 9 missing columns to spvs table (spv_type_id, job_number, assigned_*_id, commission percentages, created_by_*); (4) Superadmin login — reset all 3 superadmin passwords to standard test credential. All fixes verified end-to-end.
changelog.2.1.3: Role Standardization + Auth Redirect Fix: SPV Matrix — 42+ files updated to use unified V2.0 role enum (backend_user, backend_superadmin, company_agent, partner_agent/partner_admin) replacing all legacy names (employee, super_admin, iso, company). SAV Fund — LoginForm auth-aware redirect with useEffect + 2s fallback timeout fixes race condition where navigate fires before AuthContext updates. AI Testing Run 9: 10/10 pass, 0 regressions.
changelog.2.1.2: Test deployment fixes: BrowserRouter basename={import.meta.env.BASE_URL} added to all 4 sites for GitHub Pages subpath routing. Build process documented (env.local rename, --base flag, 404.html). AI Testing Run 8 completed (8/10 pass, 0 regressions).
changelog.2.1.1: Security Hardening: Server-side relay for bridge secret (relay-create-user), CORS hardened on 163 edge functions across all 4 sites, 7 deprecated leadcrm functions removed, matrix-replicate dual auth (JWT+bridge).
changelog.2.1.0: MCP Refactor: SDK + CLI + HTTP Adapter. Extracted 419-line monolith into centurion-sdk (15 tools), thin HTTP adapter (~100 lines), centurion-cli (local+remote). Removed centurion from SITE_REFS. CORS restricted. Hardcoded bridge secret removed. Token-check command added.
changelog.2.0.0: V2.0 Ecosystem Upgrade: 4-site consolidation, unified entity schema, Matrix 2.0 replication, workspace removal, nav redesign.
changelog.2.1.143: SPV Matrix — Pre-signed contract upload + SignedContracts admin fixes: (1) Added company_commission_rate and partner_commission_rate variables to ContractVariableManager for company and partner_agency user types (both auto-sourced from onboarding_link). (2) AddCompanyModal and AddPartnerAgencyModal now wire commission_value into allVariables under the new canonical names plus contact_first_name/contact_last_name aliases so template placeholders resolve. (3) SignedContracts admin page — widened SignedContract interface (template_id nullable, added company_agent/partner_agent user_types, nullable template/profile), new PRE_SIGNED_PREFIX/isPreSignedUpload/extractPreSignedUrl/hasViewablePdf helpers, handleViewPdf/handleDownloadPdf rewritten to extract URL from signed_content for pre-signed uploads and fetch blob for download, table now labels template_id=null rows as "Pre-signed Upload" instead of "Unknown Template", Download button uses hasViewablePdf so pre-signed uploads get a working button, modal hides Re-generate for pre-signed rows, filter dropdown + search handle company_agent/partner_agent + null templates. (4) AddClientModal.createSignedContractRecord now advances profiles.onboarding_status to setup_in_progress (with contract_signed=true and contract_signed_at) after a successful pre-signed upload — previously clients created via the pre-signed path stayed stuck in "invited / not onboarded" forever (root cause of Juan Uribe's stuck state). TypeScript compile clean. Juan Uribe profile manually unstuck earlier this session.
changelog.2.1.146: SPV Matrix Employee Bills & Commission Payouts Page (Local-only): Brand-new /employee/bills page modeled on sav.fund's bill/commission workflow. (1) Database — New migration 20260409_commissions_hold_support.sql adds 'on_hold' status to the commissions_status_check CHECK constraint (now pending|paid|cancelled|on_hold), adds hold_reason TEXT column, and creates idx_commissions_status partial index for pending/on_hold filtering. (2) Data hook — New useEmployeeBills.ts exports CommissionStatus, CommissionEntity, EmployeeBill, EmployeeCommission types plus six mutations: markBillReceived, revertBillToPending, markCommissionPaid, markCommissionUnpaid, putCommissionOnHold, releaseCommissionHold. Parallel entity-name enrichment pulls company/partner_agency/agent names in a single batch. Both ['employee-bills'] and ['employee-commissions'] query keys are invalidated together on every mutation. (3) Commission hold dialog — New CommissionHoldDialog.tsx wraps the existing shadcn Dialog with a required reason Textarea; uses PauseCircle/amber-500 iconography consistent with sav.fund. (4) Main page — New EmployeeBills.tsx (717 lines) uses EmployeeLayout with title 'Bills & Commission Payouts' and 4 StatCards (Pending Bills, Received Bills, Commissions Outstanding, Commissions Paid). Top-level Tabs split into Bills and Commission Payouts. BillsTable has sub-tabs Pending/Received/All with a DropdownMenu exposing Mark received & review commissions, Review commissions, and Revert to pending. CommissionsTable has sub-tabs Pending/On Hold/Paid/All with status-aware DropdownMenu actions (Mark paid, Put on hold, Release hold, Mark unpaid). AlertDialog confirmations gate release-hold and revert-bill. CommissionReviewModal (existing) is reused for the bill→commissions flow. useRealtimeSubscription keeps both queries live. (5) Routing — App.tsx adds /employee/bills as the primary route, aliases /employee/payments → EmployeeBills, and parks the legacy page at /employee/payments-legacy for rollback. (6) Sidebar — EmployeeSidebar.tsx mainNavItems fully re-pathed from /backend/* to /employee/* (Dashboard, To Do, Clients, Companies, Partners, SPV Jobs, Bills, Commissions, Tickets, Contracts). 'Payments' renamed to 'Bills' and pointed at /employee/bills. systemNavItems rewired (Settings /admin/settings, Help /employee/tickets, User Docs /employee/user-docs). (7) Breadcrumbs — EmployeeLayout breadcrumbMap gets '/employee/bills' → 'Bills' and redirects '/employee/payments' label to 'Bills' as well. (8) Build verified — vite build (dev mode) completes clean (3378 modules, exit 0, 6s). tsc --noEmit shows zero errors in any of the new files (EmployeeBills, CommissionHoldDialog, useEmployeeBills). Remaining tsc errors are pre-existing role-enum / Supabase-generated-type drift in unrelated files and do not affect the bundle. (9) Scope — Local only. Not deployed to production. Migration applied to the shared local Supabase (supabase_db_centurion-local) and schema verified (hold_reason column exists, status CHECK includes on_hold). Note: earlier V2.1.145 invoice-pdf module was not synced to the Windows spvmatrix repo; this version removes the Download Invoice PDF dropdown item from EmployeeBills (and its Download icon import) to keep the new page self-contained until the SAV-style lib/invoice-pdf.ts is properly synced over.

commandcenter.lastLocalChange: 2026-04-09 - v2.1.141: Restore Test Admin elevation for Human Testing. V2.1.140 inadvertently let any active testing member hit the New Test Run button on /testing — regular agents could start ecosystem-wide test suites. Fix: add is_admin BOOLEAN column to human_test_permissions (migration 20260409_002), new TestPermission.is_admin field, useMyTestPermission now returns isTestAdmin, TesterDashboard hides the New Test Run button + wizard unless isTestAdmin is true (shows an informational hint instead). HumanTestingDashboard Testing Members table gains a Test Admin Switch column + ADMIN badge; backend admins flip the switch to elevate/demote individual members. setPermissionAdmin method added to useHumanTesting hook. Secure-by-default: before the migration runs, every member reads as is_admin=false (graceful degradation via normalizePermission), so no tester can start runs until the column is live AND an admin explicitly toggles them on. Backend employees on /admin/h-testing are unaffected — they can always start runs.
commandcenter.previousLocalChange: 2026-04-09 - v2.1.140: Per-Run Role Assignments (replaces V2.1.134 global model). DB migration adds role_assignments JSONB column to human_test_runs. New Test Run dialog is a 2-step wizard: (1) pick guide, (2) grid UI where rows are active Testing Members and columns are test roles relevant to the guide (filtered from test-role-config.json by site). Admin checks cells to assign members to one or more roles for that specific run; assignments stored as {user_id,user_email,user_name,test_role_ids[]} on the run record. Skip & Create Unassigned preserves legacy behavior. TesterDashboard at /testing surfaces each run the tester is assigned to along with the login email(s)/role label(s) they should test as (My Role column + Login as banner on in-progress runs). Run history table on admin dashboard now shows an Assignments badge per run. Dead V2.1.134 code (useTestAdmin.ts, AgentTestingDashboard.tsx) neutralized into empty export stubs.

savfund.lastLocalChange: 2026-04-09 - v2.1.142: Contract download button missing for new signed contracts — fixed. Onboarding edge functions (client + agent) never called generateAndStoreContractPdf, so signed_contracts.pdf_path was NULL and every Contracts page hid the download button behind a pdf_path gate. Added ensureContractPdfPath + ensureContractPdfAndDownload lazy-generate helpers in contract-pdf-storage.ts; updated all 5 Contracts pages (iso, funder, company, client, employee) so the download button is always rendered, shows a spinner while generating, and backfills pdf_path into the DB on first download. employee/Contracts.tsx dialog View button also lazy-generates via ensureContractPdfPath + getContractPdfUrl. Local only — not deployed.
savfund.previousLocalChange: 2026-04-08 - v2.1.137: Contract Variable Standardization — company_agent + partner_agent DEFAULT_VARIABLES, OfficerSignatureManager with Company Info + Company/Agency signature managers, agent onboarding pre-fills platform settings.

leadcrm.lastLocalChange: 2026-04-07 - v2.1.135: Superadmin Management Fix — corsHeaders undefined fix, internal-delete-user auth added, .single() replaced, 9 edge functions + hooks updated for canonical roles.
leadcrm.previousLocalChange: 2026-04-07 - v2.1.124: Production deploy — all accumulated changes from v2.1.5 through v2.1.124.

spvmatrix.lastLocalChange: 2026-04-09 - v2.1.143: Pre-signed contract upload fixes and SignedContracts admin page fixes. Added company_commission_rate and partner_commission_rate to ContractVariableManager (company + partner_agency user types, auto-sourced from onboarding_link). Wired commission_value into AddCompanyModal / AddPartnerAgencyModal allVariables under new canonical names. SignedContracts admin page now displays all contracts including pre-signed PDF uploads where template_id is null — new helpers (isPreSignedUpload, extractPreSignedUrl, hasViewablePdf) extract the storage URL from signed_content, View/Download buttons work for pre-signed rows, table labels them "Pre-signed Upload" instead of "Unknown Template", filter + search handle company_agent/partner_agent and null templates. AddClientModal.createSignedContractRecord now advances profiles.onboarding_status to setup_in_progress (plus contract_signed=true, contract_signed_at) after a successful pre-signed upload — fixes the bug where clients created via the pre-signed path stayed stuck in "invited / not onboarded" forever (Juan Uribe root cause). TypeScript compile clean.
spvmatrix.previousLocalChange: 2026-04-08 - v2.1.137: Contract Variable Standardization — 5 user types in ContractVariableManager, color-coded sidebar groups, SPV Company Info + Company/Agency signature managers in Settings, agent onboarding pre-fills parent org data.
